ext.description: Prompt engineering workbench for AI coding agents: versioned Markdown prompts, child prompt generation, kanban workflow and agent terminals bound to your workspace.
welcome.noPrompts:
No prompts in this workspace yet.
[Create prompt](command:sobek.createPrompt)
Prompts are versioned under `.sobek/` at the workspace root.
welcome.noWorkspace: Open a folder to use Sobek: the open workspace is the target directory for prompts.
welcome.noTerminals:
No Sobek terminals open.
[New workspace terminal](command:sobek.newWorkspaceTerminal)
Launch agents from a prompt's context menu or run a prompt directly.
config.showAgentTerminalOffer: After creating a child prompt, offer to open a terminal with the target agent already running the prompt.
config.claudeEffort: Claude's --effort flag on terminal launches: "ask" prompts every time, "default" omits the flag, or pin low/medium/high/xhigh/max.
config.grokEffort: Grok's --effort flag on terminal launches: "ask" prompts every time, "default" omits the flag, or pin low/medium/high/xhigh/max.
config.stageDelay: Milliseconds to wait for the agent CLI to boot before typing a staged draft ("Stage as draft" mode). Increase if drafts arrive truncated.
config.terminalLocation: Where Sobek terminals open: "ask" prompts on every creation, "panel" uses the terminal panel (Ctrl+`), "editor" opens them as editor tabs.
config.aiModel: Gemini model used for prompt refinement and chat.
config.aiThinkingEnabled: Enables thinking on models that allow disabling it.
config.aiThinkingBudget: Thinking token budget for Gemini 2.5 models (empty uses a default).
config.aiUseWorkspaceContext: Injects README.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENT.md, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md and .github/copilot-instructions.md from the workspace root into Gemini system instructions.
config.aiIncludeMentionedFiles: Automatically include the contents of files @mentioned in the prompt as AI context.
config.aiIncludeLinkedPlan: Include the prompt's linked plan content as AI context.
config.aiIncludeParentPrompt: When working on a child prompt, include the parent prompt content as AI context.
config.aiIncludeWorkflowContext: Include the task state (current phase, owner, recent notes) as AI context.
config.aiIncludeGitContext: Include the current branch and latest commits as AI context.
config.usageEnabled: Show Claude Code and Codex usage limit indicators in the status bar.
config.usageCodexPath: Path to the Codex sessions directory (empty uses ~/.codex/sessions).
